mapper.insert: INSERT INTO log_operation ( user_id, username, operation_module, operation_type, request_uri, request_method, request_body, response_body, success_flag, error_message, trace_id, operation_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{username}, #{operationModule}, #{operationType}, #{requestUri}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestBody}, #{responseBody}, #{successFlag}, #{errorMessage}, #{traceId}, #{operationTime} )
